CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-27-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Denis Klavdianos, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, NIXON PEABODY LLP,
Order Granting Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant BRIAN BOGOSIAN, AN INDIVIDUAL,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $63,511.97
Pre-Judgment Interest: $16,251.60
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $512.60
Total Judgment in the amount of $80,276.17

Judgment signed in open court.
